executive_brief.summary: Monthly reporting can move from manual collection and review to a human-approved reporting workbench.
bullets: Use the blueprint as a design handoff only.
Keep final approval with the finance operations analyst.
Do not execute ERP, email, or production workflows in M6.

as_is: Collect ERP export and spreadsheet inputs
Check mapped rules and unresolved exceptions
Approve whether the package can proceed
to_be: Upload or reference prepared input evidence
Review validation findings and exception summaries
Approve final report package before downstream use
retained_human_steps: Approve any action that affects external systems
Keep final decision authority with the user

prd.purpose: Create an implementation-ready design brief for monthly report preparation.
scope: Map validation rules and known exceptions
functional_requirements: Show source inputs and validation findings
Preserve evidence references for every major requirement
Require human approval before any later pilot
non_functional_requirements: Keep audit logs for generated and exported artifacts
Support project deletion through a later runbook
success_metrics: Acceptance tests cover no-execution and schema validity
Reviewer can trace requirements back to source evidence

primary_flow: Review Markdown and JSON export preview
accessibility: Keep Korean labels readable on mobile

data_spec.retention: MVP stores append-only artifacts until deletion is requested.

api_spec.auth: Local MVP assumes trusted local operator; real auth is out of M6 scope.
errors: 409 for invalid source or schema gate failure
api_spec.idempotency: Repeated generation creates a new stored blueprint row.

acceptance_tests.when: The reviewer inspects backlog, API draft, and non-goals
acceptance_tests.then: No item requests credentials, code generation, or external execution

implementation_backlog.title: Review blueprint
implementation_backlog.description: Confirm scope, evidence, acceptance tests, and non-goals before G2.

risks_and_controls.risk: Blueprint may be mistaken for generated code.
risks_and_controls.control: Label all M6 exports as design preview only.

criteria.detail: Execution, credential, and code-generation non-goals are explicit.

open_questions: Confirm whether G2 should remain document-only or add templates.
